---
title: "Upload Assignment"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
canvas:
  type: assignment
  published: true
  points: 10
  submission_types: [online_upload]
  allowed_extensions: [py, ipynb]
---

# Upload Assignment

Write a program that prints "Hello World".

## Requirements

- Use Python 3.10+
- Include a docstring

## Submission

Upload your `.py` or `.ipynb` file.
